inline_comments.message: If the global.repository is removed we can't configure a repository once at the top level that is inherited by all subcharts of onap. Was its removal intentional?

Pulling the netbox image using the global repository doesn't work. Netbox comes with its own repository to use.


$ docker pull nexus3.onap.org:10001/netbox:v2.5.8
Error response from daemon: manifest for nexus3.onap.org:10001/netbox:v2.5.8 not found

$ docker pull netboxcommunity/netbox:v2.5.8
v2.5.8: Pulling from netboxcommunity/netbox


What do you propose to avoid this issue?
I am ok merging this at this point since this isn't the only helm chart that does that. I've raised https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-1817 to handle this appropriately in El Alto.
